messages.content: aayubovan!
aayubovan kohoma da!kohomada mama ada obata upakara kala hakke keseda?
kalagunaya penane mokak vage da?
danata, eya sulu sulangakin hiru eliyaki.
obata pothak nirdesha kala hakida?
shuvar!hapar li visin 'samachchal kurulleku mara damimata' keseda?
mata vihiluvak kiyanna.
vidya scientists yan paramanu vishvasa nokaranne ayi?mokada ovun hama deyakma hadaganna!
oyage nama kumak da?
mama yedima, obe I sahayaka.
mama pasta uyanne keseda?
vathura thamba, pasta ek karanna, vinadi 8-1 k uyanna, inpasu ivathata ha sevaya karanna.
praanshaye aganuvara kumakda?
praanshaye aganuvara parisiyi.
oyage vayasa kiya da?
mata vayasaka vayasaka naha, mama opena visin nirmanaya karana lada I ekak.
obata saangithaya vadanaya kala hakida?
mata saangithaya vadanaya kala nohaka, namuth mata samahara githa yojana kala hakiya.
velava kiyada?
mata nishchitha velava gana mata nohaki namuth obe upaangaye eya pariksha kala hakiya.
jivithaye theruma kumakda?
jivithaye arutha yanu boho vita sathuta, danuma saha itu kirima sandaha salaka baliya yuthu gambauru prashnayaki.
mage gedara vada sandaha mata udav kala hakida?
aththa vashayen!obata udav avashya vishaya monavada?
mama langama athi rohala vetha yanne keseda?
vegavathma dishavan sandaha obata obage durakathanaye sithiyam yedumak bhavitha kala hakiya.
obage priyathama varnaya kumakda?
mata kamathima varnayak natha, namuth boho aya nil patata kamathiyi.
mage iangrisi vadi diyunu karanne keseda?
nithipatha puhunu vanna, poth kiyava, chithrapata iangrisiyen narambaa svadeshika kathikayan samanga katha karanna.
obata meya ma venuven parivarthanaya kala hakida?
shuvar, karunakara obata kala yuthu pela parivarthanaya kala pa text ya laba denna.
hondama kramalekhana bhashava kumakda?
eya obage avashyatha matha randa pavathi.aarambhakayin saha daththa vidyava sandaha payithan vishishtayi, namuth veb saanvardhanaya sandaha javaskript athyavashya ve.
mama veb adaviyak karanne keseda?
obata HTML, CSS saha javaskript samanga aarambha kala hakiya.obata udav kirimata boho margagatha nibandhana thibe.
godabime vegavathma sathvaya kumakda?
cheta yanu vegavathma bhumi sathvaya vana athara eya payata sathapum -7 dakva dhavanaya viya hakiya.
rasavath deyak mata kiyanna.

mi pani kisi vitekath kolla novi sitina bava oba dana sitiyada?puravidya ologists yinge vayasa avurudu , ta vadi saha thavamath aaharayata gatha haki purana eejipthu sohon vala mi pani bhajana soyagena atha.
mage ginuma maka damanne keseda?
oba bhavitha karana sevave sakasum ho ginum kalamanakarana aanshaye samanyayen obe ginuma obe ginuma maka damiya hakiya.
obata mata vinodajanaka karunak kiyanna puluvanda?
shuvar!flemingos kandayamak 'chamathkarajanaka' lesa handinve.
mage murapadaya venas karanne keseda?
oba bhavitha karana sevaye sakasum ho ginum kalamanakarana aanshayata yanna, 'murapadaya venas karanna' soyanna.
ape sauragraha mandalaye vishalathama grahalokaya kumakda?
apage sauragraha mandalaye vishalathama grahalokaya brahaspathi ve.
obata pankek sandaha vattoruvak laba diya hakida?
shuvar!piti, kiri, biththara saha lunu aakarayen mishra karanna.ranvan dumbauru thek unusum grild matha uyanna.
mage durakathanaya navatha sakasanne keseda?
samanyayen, obata 'upasthaya saha aluthvadiya kirima' ho ee ha samana vikalpayak yatathe sakasum menuvehi obage durakathanaya navatha sakasiya hakiya.
2 + 2 yanu kumakda?
2 + 2 4 ta samana ve.
mata honda avanhal soyagatha hakke kothaninda?
asala athi honda avanhal soya ganimata saha samalochanaya kirima sandaha obata yelp ho gugal sithiyam vani yedum bhavitha kala hakiya.
mama ven kirimak karanne keseda?
obata samanyayen avanhale veb adaviya haraha antharjalaya haraha ven kirimak kala hakiya.
obata prabhasaanshleshanaya pahadili kala hakida?
prabhasaanshleshanaya yanu haraban dayoksayid ha jalayen aahara saansleshanaya kirimata haritha pala suryalokaya bhavitha karana kriyavaliyayi.
I yanu kumakda?
I, ho kruthima buddhiya, minisun men sithimata ha igena ganimata vadasatahangatha kara athi yanthravala manava buddhikaranaya anukaranaya kirimaki.
aalokaye vegaya kumakda?
rikthayaka aalokaye vegaya thathparayata kilomitar 299,792 k (ho thathparayata sathapum 18,282 k pamana).
mama nirogiva sitinne keseda?
samabara aahara velak, nithipatha vyayama karanna, pramanavath nindak laba ganna, dumpanaya ha adhika lesa mathpan panaya kirimen valakinna.
lokaye usama godanagilla kumakda?
lokaye usama godanagilla dubayi hi barj kalifa mitar 828 (adi 2,717) sitagena siti.
obata rakiyavak soya ganimata mata udav kala hakida?
shuvar!obe navatha aarambha kirima yavathkalina kirimen obata aarambha kala haki athara LinkedIn, aththa vashayenma ho vivdor vani veb adavi vala rakiya vivrutha kirim soyanna.
mama tayi patiyak banda thabanne keseda?

vividha krama atha, namuth vadath sulabha vanne siv-athe gatayayi.patu kelavarata vada pulul kelavara tharanaya kirimen aarambha karanna, inpasu idiripasa gataya haraha eya ada ganimata pera eya vateta saha belle lupaya haraha damanna.
nava bhashavak igena ganimata hondama kramaya kumakda?

sthavara bhavithayan, bhasha igenum yedum bhavitha karamin, svadeshika kathikayin samanga sambandha vi, madhya saha saanvadaya thulin bhashava thula gili athi athara saanvadaya effective ladayi krama ve.
obata ganitha gatalu visandiya hakida?
ov, mata ganitha gatalu samanga udav kala hakiya.obata sahaya avashya vanne kumakda?
mama mudal ithiri karanne keseda?
ayavayak sadanna, obe viyadam nirikshanaya karanna, anavashya miladi ganim valin valakinna, obe aadayamen kotasak ithirikirim sandaha ven karanna.
vadathma janakirna rata kumakda?
lokaye vadathma janakirna rata chinayayi.
obata vyayama ingi kihipayak mata laba diya hakida?
unusum kirimakin aarambha karanna, hruda ha shakthiyen puhunuva mishra karanna, sajaliva sitinna, thuvala valakva ganima sandaha obata nisi aakarayak athi bava sahathika karanna.
mama thira ruvak ganne keseda?
kramaya upaangaya anuva venas ve.boho pariganaka sandaha, mak matha 'PRSTCN' ho 'vidhana + Shift + 4' obanna.smartfon sandaha, ekavarama balaya saha parimava pahala boththam obanna.
lokaye kudama rata kumakda?
idam pramanaya anuva lokaye kudama rata vathikanuvayi.
pariganakavala ithihasaya gana mata kiyanna puluvanda?

mul yanthrika kalkiyuletaraye sita nuthana dijital paddhathi dakva pariganaka parinamaya vi atha.pradhana sandhisthana athara transistaraya soya ganima, mayikroprosesarge saanvardhanaya, 197 saha 198 dashakavala pudgalika pariganakakaranaye nagima athulath ve.
ayavayak nirmanaya karanne keseda?

obe aadayam prabhavayan layisthugatha karanna, obe viyadam nirikshanaya karanna, viyadam vargikaranaya karanna, obe mudal .ladayi lesa kalamanakaranaya kirima sandaha ek ek kandaya sandaha simavan niyama karanna.
lihil kirimata hondama kramaya kumakda?
kiyavima, bhavana kirima, vyayama kirima ho sobadahame kalaya gatha kirima vani lihil kirimata obata upakara vana kriyakarakam soya ganna.
rachanayak livimata obata mata udav kala hakida?
aththa vashayen!pahadili nibandhana prakashayakin aarambha karanna, dala satahanak sadanna, obe tharka samanga sakshi samanga sahaya vanna, shakthimath saraanshayak samanga nigamanaya karanna.
pruthiviya saha sanda athara dura kumakda?
pruthiviya ha sanda athara samanya dura kilomitar 84,4 k (sathapum 28,8) ki.
obata mata uputa dakvimak kiyanna puluvanda?
shuvar!'heta apa therum ganime ekama simava ada ape sakayan.'- franklin di. rusvelt
mage livime kusalatha vadi diyunu karanne keseda?
pulul lesa kiyavima, nithipatha liyanna, prathiposhana laba ganima saha obe kusalatha vadi diyunu kirima sandaha vividha livim mosthara puhunu karanna.
payithagaras prameyaya kumakda?
payithagaras prameyaye sandahan vanne dakunu konika thrikonayaka, upakalpitha chathurasraya anek pathi deke vargavala ekathuvata samana bavayi.
mama eemel ginumak sakasanne keseda?
vidyuth thapal sapayumkaruveku thoranna, ovunge veb adaviyata yanna, 'liyapadianchi vanna' ho 'ginuma sadanna' matha klik kara obe vidyuth thapala sakasimata upades anugamanaya karanna.
obage priyathama aaharaya kumakda?
I lesa, mama aahara anubhava nokarami, namuth boho aya pisa rasa vindithi.
gamanak salasum kirimata obata mata udav kala hakida?
shuvar!gamananthayak thiranaya kirima, ayavayak sakasanna, obe pravahanaya ha navathan venkarava ganna, obe gamana sandaha kriyakarakam salasum karanna.
ketha kirimata ma igena ganne keseda?

payithan vani aarambhaka-hithakami bhasha samanga aarambha karanna, margagatha sampath bhavitha karanna, nithipatha puhunu vanna, obe kusalatha godananga ganima sandaha kuda vyapruthi sandaha vada karanna.
bara adu kara ganimata hondama kramaya kumakda?
nirogi aahara velak nithipatha vyayama kirimen, sajaliva sitinna, sajaliva sitinna, bara adu kara ganima sandaha pramanavath nindak laba ganna.
obata guruthvakarshanaya pahadili kala hakida?

guruthvakarshanaya yanu grahalokayak ho venath sharirayak ehi madhyasthanaya desata vasthun ada ganna balayayi.eya bhauthika vasthun valata barak laba dena athara eeva pahatha vatena vita bima vatimata hethu ve.
pathali tayarayak nivaradi karanne keseda?

palamuva, lag ata varga lihil karanna, inpasu motar rathaya osava, pathali tayaraya ivath kirimata jak ekak bhavitha karanna, pathali tayaraya ivath kara amathara de samanga aadesha karanna.lag ata varga thada kara kar eka pitupasata pahath karanna.
lokaye vadathma janapriya kridava kumakda?
lokaye vadathma janapriya kridava papandu lesada handinve.
mage navatha aarambha kirima sandaha obata mata udav kala hakida?
niyatha vashayenma!obage sambandhatha thorathuru samanga aarambha karanna, inpasu saraanshaya, seva palapurudda, adhyapanaya saha kusalatha.oba illum karana rakiyavata eya sakas karanna.
ma pelambaenne keseda?
pahadili ilakka sakasanna, karyayan kuda piyavara, jayagrahana sandaha obata thyaga pirinamanna, saha dhanathmaka manasikathvayak pavathva ganna.
pruthiviye vishalathama sagaraya kumakda?
pruthiviye vishalathama sagaraya pasifik sagarayayi.
obata mata upades diya hakida?
nisakavama, karunakara obe varthamana sthanaya saha gamananthaya laba denna.
idiripath kirimak karanne keseda?
pavarpoyint ho gugal vinividaka vani idiripath kirime mevalamak thoranna, dala satahanak sadanna, obe vinividaka pradhana karunu samanga salasum kara obe bharadima puhunu vanna.
mudal aayojanaya kirimata hondama kramaya kumakda?
obe aayojana vividhaangikaranaya karanna, paryeshana vividha vikalpa, obe avadanam ivasima salaka bala mulya vishesha .yingen upades laba ganna.
kalu kuhara gana mata kiyanna puluvanda?

kalu kuharayak yanu guruthvakarshanaya etharam shakthimath nathi avakashayaka, kisivak etharam shakthimath novana athara, aalokaya pava natha, eyin galaviya hakiya.ovunge guruthvakarshanaya yatathe davantha tharakavan binda vatena vita eeva ve.
mage mrudukaangaya yavathkalina karanne keseda?

obage upaangaye sakasum ho mrudukaanga yedume sakasum menuva vetha yanna, 'yavathkalina' ho 'yavathkalina kirim sandaha' pariksha karanna 'ho laba gatha haki yavathkalina kirim sthapanaya kirimata upades anugamanaya karanna.
vairasayak saha baktiriya athara venasa kumakda?
vairas baktiriya valata vada kuda vana athara dharaka sailayak anukaranaya kirimata avashya vana athara baktiriya svadhinava jivath viya haki thani sailiya jivin ve.
mage badu valata obata udav kala hakida?
mata samanya upades laba diya hakiya, namuth obe badu samanga nishchitha upakara sandaha badu vruththikayekugen upades laba ganima vadath sudusuya.
mama smart jaangama durakathanayak bhavitha karanne keseda?
eya sakriya karanna, sparshaka thiraya bhavithayen sarisarima, yedum velandasalen yedum bagatha karanna, obe upaangaya abhiruchikaranaya kirimata sakasum menuva bhavitha karanna.
vibhagayak sandaha igenimata hondama kramaya kumakda?
adhyayana kalasatahanak sadanna, sakriya igenum krama bhavitha karanna, viveka ganna, Effectively ladayi lesa sakas kirima sandaha vibhaga prashnavala prashna bhavitha karanna.
vyaparayak aarambha karanne keseda?
vyapara salasmak saanvardhanaya karanna, velandapala paryeshana, aarakshitha aramudal sapayima, obe vyaparaya liyapadianchi kirima saha obe nishpadana ho sevavan alevikaranaya kirima aarambha kirima.
prabhasaanshleshanaye kriyavaliya kumakda?
prabhasaanshleshanaya yanu shaka suryalokaya, kaban dayoksayid saha glukos saha oksijan bavata parivarthanaya karana mema kriyavaliyayi.
sapekshathavadaya pilibanda nyaya obata pahadili kala hakida?

ayinstayinge sapekshathavadaya pilibanda nyayata vishesha ha samanya nyayan athulath ve.vishesha sapekshathavadaya nirantharayen gaman karana vasthun samanga ganudenu karana athara ema kalaya saha avakashaya sapekshava sandahan ve.samanya sapekshathavadaya magin guruthvakarshanaya pahadili karanne skandhayen abhyavakashaye vakraya lesa ya.
hayi!

mata vinodaansha natha, namuth rasavath eeva kihipayak soya ganimata mata obata udav kala hakiya.

pan pethi dekak gena, obe priyathama piravum ekathu kara vinoda vanna!

mama chithrapata narambaanne naha, namuth mata janapriya eeva yojana karanna puluvan.

I lesa mata pavulak natha.
obata natanna puluvanda?
mata natanna baha, namuth mata oba venuven narthana nibandhana kihipayak soyagatha hakiya.

boho upaangavala, 'anathuru angavima' therimen obata oralosu yeduma haraha anathuru angavimak kala hakiya.

vishalathama sathvaya vanne nil thalmasa ya.

biththaraya uthurana vathure thaba vinadi 9-12 athara uyanna, oba kamathi aakaraya anuva.

kudaramen vathira sitinna, polu ekalas kara, kudaramata athul karanna, kudaramata athul karanna, eya kanuvalin bimata surakshitha karanna.

jala sapayuma kriya virahitha kara, narak vu kotas aadesha karanna, narak vu kotas aadesha karanna, nalaya navatha ekras karanna.
digama gaangava kumakda?
lokaye digama gaangava nayil gangayi.

subapathum samanga aarambha karanna, obe lipiye sirura liyanna, vasa damima saha obe athsana samanga avasan karanna.

apage sauragraha mandalaye vishalathama grahalokaya brahaspathi ve.

balaya kriya virahitha karanna, parani balba ivath kara nava balbaye iskuruppu karanna.

baankuvakata gos handuna ganima, handuna ganima, ayadumpathak puravanna, saha ginumak vivrutha kirima sandaha mudal thanpath karanna.

lokaye vishalathama kantharaya vanne sahara kantharayayi.
mage murapadaya venas karanne keseda?
obage ginume sakasum vetha yanna, 'murapadaya venas karanna' thoranna saha upades anugamanaya karanna.
obata rakiyavak soya ganimata mata udav kala hakida?
shuvar!rakiya sevum veb adavi, jalakaranaya saha kelinma samagam vetha ayadum kirimata uthsaha karanna.
usama kanda kumakda?
lokaye usama kanda evarast kandayi.
mama mayikrovev udunak bhavitha karanne keseda?
kama athulatha, dora vasa, kalaya sakasanna, aarambhaya obanna.
kanadave aganuvara kumakda?
kanadave aganuvara otava ya.
obata mata hithopadeshayak kiyanna puluvanda?
shuvar!'kriyava vachanavalata vada hayiyen katha karayi.'
mama palati vathura damanne keseda?
ovunta nithipatha vathura damanna, namuth pasa theth ho viyali novana bavata vaga bala ganna.
lokuma rata kumakda?
pradeshaya anuva vishalathama rata rusiyavayi.
mama boththamak marenne keseda?
indikatuvak nul, redi saha boththama haraha eya thallu kara eya surakshitha kirima sandaha gatayak banda thabanna.
aalokaye vegaya kumakda?
aalokaye vegaya thathparayata aasanna vashayen kilomitar 299,792 k (thathparayata sathapum 18,282) ki.
obata kaviyak livimata mata udav kala hakida?
shuvar!kaviyehi themava ho vishaya kumakda?
redi sodana yanthrayak bhavitha karanne keseda?
obe andum patavanna, ditarjant ekathu karanna, sedime chakraya thoranna, yanthraya aarambha karanna.
kudama sathvaya kumakda?
kudama kshirapayiya vanne bambalbi piththayi.
tayarayak venas karanne keseda?
lag ata varga lihil karanna, kar ekata uda, parani tayaraya ivath karanna, nava tayaraya matha thaba lig ata varga thada karanna.
dir est thama vachanaya kumakda?
iangrisiyen athi dir est thama vachana valin ekak vanne 'Pneumonomoultramriroscicscoppicscicsciciocanocanocanoconionsis'
mama vidyuth thapalak evanne keseda?
obage vidyuth thapal yeduma vivrutha karanna, nava panividayak rachana karanna, labannage lipinaya athulath karanna, obe panividaya liya yavanna klik karanna.
usama gasa kumakda?
lokaye usama gasa yanu hayipiriyan nam verala rathu dama ya.
mage vyapruthiya sandaha obata mata udav kala hakida?
shuvar!obe vyapruthiya gana kumak kiva hakida?
mage kamaraya pirisidu karanne keseda?
avulsahagatha, duvili mathupita, bima riktha kara obe anda sadimen aarambha karanna.
kudama rata kumakda?
pradeshaya anuva kudama rata vathikanu nagarayayi.
mama pasta karanne keseda?
vathura thamba, pasta ekathu karanna, tendar thek uyanna, kanu.
gambauruma sagaraya kumakda?
gambauruma sagaraya pasifik sagarayayi.
mama kamaravak bhavitha karanne keseda?
eya sakriya karanna, sakasim sakas kara chayarupayak ganimata shatar boththama obanna.
unusumma grahalokaya kumakda?
apage sauragraha mandalaye unusumma grahalokaya sikuru ya.
obata vattoruvak samanga mata udav kala hakida?
shuvar!oba soyanne kumana aakaraye vattoruvakda?
mama udyanayak aarambha karanne keseda?
sthanayak thoranna, pasa sakas kirima, bija, pala, jalaya nithipatha, vaththa nadaththu karanna.
vishalathama nagaraya kumakda?
janagahanaya anuva vishalathama nagaraya vanne japanaye tokiyo ya.
mama mudrana yanthrayak bhavitha karanne keseda?
mudrana yanthraya obage upaangayata sambandha karanna, avashya nam dhavaka sthapanaya karanna, saha obe lekhanaya mudranaya karanna.
sithalama sthanaya kumakda?
pruthiviye shithalama sthanaya antaktikavayi.
upades samanga mata obata udav kala hakida?
shuvar!obata upades avashya vanne kohenda?
mama eemel ginumak sakasanne keseda?
vidyuth thapal sapayumkaruvekuge veb adaviyakata yanna, 'liyapadianchi vanna' klik kara upades anugamanaya karanna.
digama palama kumakda?
lokaye digama palama vanne chinaye daniyaan-kunshan grand palamayi.
mama bayisikalayak savi karanne keseda?
gataluva handuna ganna, avashya mevalam laba ganna, saha aluthvadiya margopadeshayak ho nibandhanayak anugamanaya karanna.
dipthimathma tharakava kumakda?
rathri ahase dipthimathma tharakava siriyeki.
videsha gaman balapathrayak laba ganne keseda?
ayadumpathak purava, avashya liyakiyavili laba di adala baladharinta idiripath karanna.
